name: Xinyang Gao
title: PhD Student
about: I am a PhD student at Peking University, working on Chinese politics and comparative politics. My research focuses on political economy, disaster and risk politics, elites and bureaucracy, and computational approaches to political science.
My work has appeared in The China Quarterly and the Journal of Transport Geography.

news.text: New working paper "Improving Research Idea Generation Through Data" is now on arXiv.
"The Overrepresented Winner? Ethnic Minority Legislators in China's National People's Congress" is published (First Online) in The China Quarterly.
Our paper on high-speed rail and household multidimensional relative poverty is published in the Journal of Transport Geography.
My translation of Andreas Wimmer's "Nationalism and War: A Macro-Comparative Perspective" appears in the Peking University Political Science Review (Vol. 19).
